## Critical Flags

### 1. Lily's Birthday — She's at Mom's
Lily turns 12 on **Monday 3/16**. She's at Mom's house Sunday AND Monday.
- **Birthday dinner with Dad:** Best option is **Friday 3/20** (first evening the whole family is together and rested)
- **Recommendation: Low-key welcome-home on Tuesday (cupcakes + easy meal) → Full birthday dinner Friday night**

### 2. Tuesday Childcare — RESOLVED
Parent 1 is post-nights. Parent 2 works 7a-7p. **Sitter covers 7AM-noon.** Parent 1 sleeps until noon, takes over toddler, picks up Lily from school. Gap closed.

## Meal Plan

### SUNDAY — Early Dinner Before Night Shift
**Cook:** Parent 1 | **Headcount:** 2 adults + toddler (Lily at Mom's)
**Meal:** Crockpot chicken tortilla soup + fresh sourdough
- Start crockpot morning, eat by 5PM before night shift
- Toddler: soft shredded chicken in broth + bread pieces

### MONDAY — Parent 2 Solo
**Cook:** Parent 2 (crockpot) | **Headcount:** 1 adult + toddler
**Meal:** Crockpot white chicken chili
- Small batch. Parent 1 grabs a bowl before 7PM shift.
- Toddler: shredded chicken + mashed beans

### TUESDAY — Lily Comes Home! Mini Birthday
**Cook:** Parent 1 (post-nights — KEEP IT SIMPLE) | **Headcount:** 3 + toddler
**Meal:** Crockpot beef stew + leftover sourdough
- Parent 1 starts crockpot before going back to sleep — 10 min prep
- Sitter keeps an eye on it
- Stew is ready when Lily gets home from school
- **Mini birthday moment:** Light some candles, small cake or cupcakes ready
- Carrots + potatoes cook soft in stew = toddler-safe

### WEDNESDAY — Parent 1 Off, Parent 2 Working
**Cook:** Parent 1 | **Headcount:** 2 + toddler (Lily at Mom's)
**Meal:** Chicken piccata + pasta
- Good night for a recipe both adults enjoy — no kid palate to navigate
- Have it ready for when Parent 2 walks in at 7PM
- Toddler: soft pasta + shredded chicken

### THURSDAY — Parent 2 Cooks, Parent 1 on Day Shift
**Cook:** Parent 2 (sheet pan) | **Headcount:** 2 + toddler
**Meal:** Sheet pan honey garlic chicken + sweet potatoes + broccoli
- 10 min prep, oven does the rest
- Sweet potatoes = toddler finger food gold

### FRIDAY — BIRTHDAY DINNER — Full House
**Cook:** Parent 1 (after day shift) | **Headcount:** 4 — FULL HOUSE
**Meal:** Homemade pasta night (the birthday showpiece)
- Parent 2 is off all day → can prep ingredients, set table, handle pickup
- Parent 1 gets home, showers, and cooks the main event
- Let the birthday kid pick their pasta shape
- Birthday cake for dessert — the real one
- Toddler: small cut pasta + butter

### SATURDAY — Easy Day
**Cook:** Parent 2 (leftovers) | **Headcount:** 2 + toddler
**Meal:** Leftover pasta reheated OR crockpot pulled chicken tacos
- Keep it simple — the big cooking happened Friday

## Grocery List

### Proteins
- Chicken breasts/thighs (3 lbs — soup, chili, sheet pan)
- Stew beef (1.5 lbs — Tuesday)
- Ground beef or Italian sausage (Friday pasta, if doing Bolognese)

### Produce
- Sweet potatoes (3)
- Broccoli (1 head)
- Russet potatoes (2 lbs — stew)
- Carrots (1 bag — stew)
- Onions (4)
- Garlic (2 bulbs)
- Lemons (2)
- Cilantro (1 bunch)
- Limes (2)

### Dairy & Eggs
- Butter
- Parmesan wedge
- Shredded cheese
- Sour cream
- Eggs (1 dozen)
- Milk

### Pantry
- Pasta flour or boxed pasta
- Canned diced tomatoes (2)
- Chicken broth (3-4 cartons)
- Black beans (2 cans)
- White beans (1 can)
- Honey
- Olive oil

### Birthday
- Birthday cake (for Friday)
- 12 candles
- Cupcakes for Tuesday mini-celebration

## What's Going On This Week

**Saturday 3/21**
- Spring Fling Street Fair — Downtown, 10am-4pm (Family) ~5 min
  - Live music, food trucks, bounce houses, face painting
- Minor League Baseball — City Stadium, 6:05pm (Family) ~15 min
  - $5 lawn seats, fireworks after the game

**Sunday 3/22**
- Farmers Market — Town Square, 9am-1pm (Family) ~10 min
  - Weekly market, 60+ vendors, live music, stroller-friendly
- Kite Festival — Bayfront Park, 11am-3pm (Toddler/Kid-friendly) ~20 min
  - Free admission, kite-making station for kids

**Weeknight Pick**
- Wednesday: Story Time at the Library — 10:30am (Toddler-friendly) ~5 min
